retry_reason: Not a wrapper — the refcount operations are not the primary purpose, so retry analysis is not applicable.

judge.reason: The function's primary purpose is to allocate and construct an IGMP query packet (sk_buff), not to manage reference counts. Refcount operations (allocation with implicit refcount_set, kfree_skb on error) are incidental to packet creation.
